required_preferences.fact: Now involves her sibling in managing their mother’s finances—shares duties to focus on direct caregiving responsibilities

supersedes.fact: Manages her mother’s finances personally—never delegates this task, even when busy

required_preferences.fact: Now prefers recording video tutorial instructions for colleagues—avoids lengthy written documentation due to wrist strain

supersedes.fact: Prefers written documentation over video tutorials when instructing colleagues—never records training videos herself

required_preferences.fact: Sets up recurring cross-team check-ins to address financial process questions—actively fosters communication between former separate teams for smoother integration
Plans annual family vacations to national parks—never revisits the same park twice
Does Sunday night budget reviews for both work and personal finances—never skips, regardless of plans
Limits coffee after 3pm—even during late budget crunches, switches to herbal tea in the afternoon

persona: A finance manager at a nonprofit organization with limited technical resources
